item.description:
A big feature release.
## New - **Bring-your-own AI** — Google Vertex AI, Gemini API key, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (OpenAI, OpenRouter, Groq, local Ollama). Keys stored in the macOS Keychain. - **More speech engines** — Parakeet v2/v3, Whisper Large v3, Cohere Transcribe, switchable in Settings. - **Output modes** — Paste, Type characters (no clipboard; works in terminals), or Copy only. - **Live transcription** (optional) — watch the words appear as you speak. - **Cancel window** — an optional countdown before insertion so you can abort; cancel works mid-transcription too (cancels the network call). - **Microphone picker**, **start/stop sounds**, **launch at login**. - **Auto-updates** via Sparkle — this and every future version update themselves.
## Polished - Redesigned, System Settings–style preferences (sidebar, hero headers, glass nav). - Reworked History (day-grouped, click-to-copy) and Dictionary (native table). - First-run onboarding, Insights (words/streak/time saved), editable per-mode prompts.
## Install Download `WisprFree-0.1.4.zip`, unzip, move **WisprFree.app** to /Applications. On first launch **right-click → Open**, or `xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/WisprFree.app`. Apple Silicon, macOS 14+. Local dictation is fully offline; a cloud AI is optional (cleanup only).

First release with built-in auto-updates (Sparkle). Future versions will update automatically — no more manual downloads.
Also includes the day-grouped History cards, the native inset Dictionary table, and the settings UI polish from 0.1.2.
